query: mixed color temperature sodium vapor orange streetlight clashing fluorescent night urban
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: mixed color temp — sodium vapor orange vs blue twilight, clashing artificial light sources, desolate urban night

response.objective_caption: A nighttime view of a commercial street lined with brick buildings and storefronts. A prominent corner neon sign reads 'GOOLRICK'S DRUGS' in green and pink vertical lettering. Warm street lamps cast light along the sidewalk where cars are parked. Snowflake ornaments hang from trees on the left side of the road. Traffic signals glow green in the distance. A dark vehicle is visible in the lower left foreground, and illuminated shop windows line the street. A green and white 'Parking' sign stands near the corner.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A nighttime long-exposure view of a commercial street lined with brick buildings and storefronts. A prominent corner neon sign reads 'GOOLRICK'S DRUGS' in green and pink vertical lettering. Red light trails from moving vehicles streak horizontally across the road. Warm street lamps cast light along the sidewalk where cars are parked. Snowflake ornaments hang from trees on the left side of the road. Traffic signals glow green in the distance. A dark vehicle is visible in the lower left foreground, and illuminated shop windows line the street. The motion blur from the long exposure creates dynamic light trails through the scene.
